brand.name: Syanah
brand.tagline: Saudi Arabia's top maintenance providers, in one app

home.heroSubtitle: Book a verified technician for your home, car, or business in any Saudi city. Live tracking, transparent pricing, service guarantee.

categories.title: Browse by category
categories.subtitle: We cover everything your home or business needs

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Body: Browse categories or search for the service you need.
howItWorks.step2Body: See ratings, experience, and prices before you book.
howItWorks.step3Body: Track your technician live and rate them when done.

providersCta.title: Are you a service provider?
providersCta.body: Join our network and get real bookings daily. Register in minutes, verify your identity, and start working.

footer.tagline: Syanah Platform — Kingdom of Saudi Arabia

hints.passwordPolicy: 8+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.body: You don't have permission to view this page.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Pick a category to browse services and providers
services.categorySubtitle: Choose a city; rate providers after each job

noProvidersYet.title: We're matching you with top providers in this category
noProvidersYet.body: Providers are being registered and verified. Sign up to be notified when one is available near you.

providersList.title: Providers
providersList.subtitle: Search, filter by category or city, and rate after each job
providersList.emptyBody: Try selecting a category or city, or browse the most popular categories:

overview.title: Admin overview
overview.subtitle: Platform activity at a glance
overview.recentActivityBody: Live event stream will appear here once Supabase is wired.

categories.title: Manage categories
categories.subtitle: Create, edit, enable/disable categories and subcategories

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Search, enable, or disable any user
users.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or email

translations.title: Manage translations
translations.subtitle: Edit any user-facing string without redeploying

settings.title: Platform settings
settings.subtitle: Control languages, themes, windows, and API keys
settings.cancelWindowHint: Requester can cancel free within this window
settings.disputesWindowHint: After this, the dispute right closes
settings.apiKeysIntro: Stored encrypted server-side and never exposed to the browser.

pricing.title: Provider packages
pricing.subtitle: Pick the tier that fits your business. Start free, upgrade when you grow.

ratings.title: Rate your experience
ratings.scorePrompt: How many stars do you give the provider?
ratings.commentPlaceholder: Describe your experience to help others

disputes.title: Open a dispute
disputes.intro: Open a dispute if you faced an issue. Ratings will be frozen and admins will review chat evidence.
disputes.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Provider didn't show up; work incomplete
disputes.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain what happened with details that help the review team
disputes.descriptionHint: Attach photos or audio in the chat before opening, if possible
disputes.opened: Dispute opened. Our team will reach out shortly.

new.title: New service request
new.subtitle: Four quick steps to complete your order
new.notesHint: Optional — anything that helps the provider
new.submittedBody: It will appear in My Orders shortly.

chatDemo.title: Chat preview
chatDemo.subtitle: Visual prototype of an order conversation: text, location, voice, and system messages. Realtime is wired to Supabase in Phase 7.

mapDemo.title: Maps demo
mapDemo.subtitle: Technical preview of the location picker — used later in order creation and provider tracking.
mapDemo.pickerHint: Click on the map to move the pin. If Google Maps key isn't set, a visual placeholder is shown.
